questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "plot"?
questions.explanation: "plot" có nghĩa là "cốt truyện".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "flashback"?
questions.explanation: "flashback" có nghĩa là "hồi tưởng".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "simultaneously"?
questions.explanation: "simultaneously" có nghĩa là "đồng thời".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "while"?
questions.explanation: "while" có nghĩa là "trong khi".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "as"?
questions.explanation: "as" có nghĩa là "khi/lúc".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "moment"?
questions.explanation: "moment" có nghĩa là "khoảnh khắc".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "incident"?
questions.explanation: "incident" có nghĩa là "sự việc".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "witness"?
questions.explanation: "witness" có nghĩa là "chứng kiến/nhân chứng".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "noise"?
questions.explanation: "noise" có nghĩa là "tiếng ồn".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "dark"?
questions.explanation: "dark" có nghĩa là "tối".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "storm"?
questions.explanation: "storm" có nghĩa là "cơn bão".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "journey"?
questions.explanation: "journey" có nghĩa là "hành trình".

questions.question: Choose the best word: At that _____, the door opened.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "At that moment, the door opened." — từ đúng là "moment" (khoảnh khắc).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Nobody saw the _____ happen.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Nobody saw the incident happen." — từ đúng là "incident" (sự việc).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She was a _____ to the accident.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She was a witness to the accident." — từ đúng là "witness" (chứng kiến/nhân chứng).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I heard a strange _____ outside.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I heard a strange noise outside." — từ đúng là "noise" (tiếng ồn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: It was getting _____ when we arrived.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "It was getting dark when we arrived." — từ đúng là "dark" (tối).

questions.question: Choose the best word: A _____ was coming as we left.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "A storm was coming as we left." — từ đúng là "storm" (cơn bão).

questions.question: Choose the best word: During the _____, we were singing songs.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "During the journey, we were singing songs." — từ đúng là "journey" (hành trình).

questions.question: Choose the best word: They were arguing when I came in. (_____)
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "They were arguing when I came in." — từ đúng là "argue" (tranh cãi).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She was _____ing to her friend.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She was whispering to her friend." — từ đúng là "whisper" (thì thầm).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Someone was _____ing in the street.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Someone was shouting in the street." — từ đúng là "shout" (hét lên).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The thief was trying to _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The thief was trying to escape." — từ đúng là "escape" (trốn thoát).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I didn't _____ him leaving.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I didn't notice him leaving." — từ đúng là "notice" (nhận thấy).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: While I ___ TV, the phone rang.
questions.explanation: Past continuous for an action in progress interrupted by a past simple action.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: They ___ football when it started to rain.
questions.explanation: Past continuous describes the longer background action.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: What ___ you doing at 8 p.m. yesterday?
questions.explanation: Use 'were' with 'you' in past continuous questions.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She was cooking while he ___ the table.
questions.explanation: Two simultaneous past actions both use past continuous.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I ___ not sleeping when you called.
questions.explanation: Singular subject 'I' takes 'was'.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: As we ___ home, we saw an accident.
questions.explanation: Past continuous sets the scene for a past simple event.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The sun ___ shining and birds were singing.
questions.explanation: Singular subject 'sun' takes 'was'.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: They were arguing when I ___ in.
questions.explanation: The short interrupting action uses past simple.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: We ___ dinner when the lights went out.
questions.explanation: Past continuous for the action in progress.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: While the children ___, the parents talked.
questions.explanation: Simultaneous past actions use past continuous.

questions.question: Which English word means "cốt truyện"?
questions.explanation: "cốt truyện" trong tiếng Anh là "plot".

questions.question: Which English word means "hồi tưởng"?
questions.explanation: "hồi tưởng" trong tiếng Anh là "flashback".

questions.question: Which English word means "đồng thời"?
questions.explanation: "đồng thời" trong tiếng Anh là "simultaneously".

questions.question: Which English word means "trong khi"?
questions.explanation: "trong khi" trong tiếng Anh là "while".

questions.question: Which English word means "khi/lúc"?
questions.explanation: "khi/lúc" trong tiếng Anh là "as".

questions.question: Which English word means "khoảnh khắc"?
questions.explanation: "khoảnh khắc" trong tiếng Anh là "moment".
